147.reason: [If the string is not terminated, this will cause an IndexOutOfBoundsException when i+1 exceeds the string length]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [If the string is not terminated, this will cause an IndexOutOfBoundsException when i+1 exceeds the string length]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [If the string is not terminated (i.e., no closing "), this will cause an IndexOutOfBoundsException when accessing source.charAt(i + 1) after reaching the end of input. Also, it fails to handle unterminated string literals as lexical errors.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [If the string is unterminated, this will cause an IndexOutOfBoundsException when i+1 exceeds the string length]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [If the string is unterminated, this will cause an IndexOutOfBoundsException when i+1 exceeds the string length]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [If the string is not terminated, this will cause an IndexOutOfBoundsException when i+1 exceeds the string length]

158.reason: [If the character constant is unterminated (e.g., only a single quote at end of file), accessing next may be invalid and i+=2 will skip beyond input, causing incorrect parsing or crash]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [If the character constant is unterminated (e.g., only a single quote at end of file), accessing next may be invalid and i+=2 will skip beyond input, causing incorrect parsing or crash]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This assumes that every character constant has exactly one character between quotes. It does not validate whether there actually is a character (e.g., '\'' alone would read beyond bounds), nor does it handle malformed or unterminated character constants like "'a" or "'" as errors. Also, if next is '\0' (end of file), this will produce an invalid token instead of reporting an error.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [If the character constant is unterminated (e.g., only a single quote at the end of file), accessing next may be invalid and i+=2 could skip beyond the input or misread malformed input without error reporting]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [If the character constant is unterminated (e.g., only a single quote or quote followed by EOF), accessing next may be invalid and i+=2 can skip beyond valid bounds without error checking]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [If the character constant is unterminated (e.g., only a single quote at the end of file), accessing next may be invalid and i+=2 could skip beyond the input or misread malformed input without error reporting]
